svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="防刷覆盖率三层防线" id="covgates"> <mxGraphModel dx="-480" dy="-93" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="防 Agent 刷覆盖率的三层防线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="340" x="320" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="防线 1:扫占位断言
pre-commit 扫 expect(true).toBe(true)
防「凑覆盖率写假测试」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="防线 2:扫 @Ignore
必须带理由 + issue 号
防「用 ignore 缩小分母」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="360" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="防线 3:覆盖率 diff 卡
新增代码覆盖率 ≥ 80%
防「存量烂新增跟着烂」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="660" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="核心原则
不卡绝对值,卡增量 · 不卡总数,卡质量
「过去的债我承认,别再欠新债」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="580" x="200" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="result" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" value="结果:Agent 想刷也刷不动 —— 刷占位被扫、ignore 被卡、新增 diff 不达标照样红" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="620" x="180" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="g1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="g2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="g2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="g3" /> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="g3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="core" /> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="g1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="core" /> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="g2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" target="core" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
